\SE[7]Tch...damn it, \n[1]. The village chief isn't here. Was there really a summons?

Y-yeah...! He said he was going to hold a meeting earlier though~... M-maybe he just
hasn't arrived yet...ahaha........

\SE[23]...It's pitch black........ H-hey...isn't there no one here? We didn't get the date
wrong, did we?
That can't be! Because just now...ah!

...A hole leading outside in a place like this...? Does this connect to the
backyard...?
\SE[17]Whoa, what is this... ...You don't think the village chief went in there...?
L-let's go check it out. Maybe he went ahead and is waiting for us.

\SE[1]...Hey, I...um........ ...O-oh yeah! I forgot something at home, so I should go back
for a sec────

N-no way! You're just trying to run away with an excuse like that! Come on, Dario!
You're coming with us!
Whoa! H-hey, don't push me! Okay! I get it! Let me walk slowly! Hey...!
完了までウェイト = false
........Is no one here? No, then... maybe that altar in the back...?

\SM[double]Hey! Hey! Why am I at the very front!? Y-you don't believe in ghosts, Dario, so you
should go ahead!

W-well, that's because you're the only one who can use light magic... And besides, if
a ghost does show up, you can chase it away with magic, right? R-right!? \n[1]!?

Well, yeah... But only if the ghost's true form is a monster like a Wisp or
something...

\SE[15]\SM[tremble]B-but! If it's a real human ghost, that's a different story!? We don't even know if
magic would work on it...! Ugh, I-I'm scared...!

\SE[1]M-Mana-chan! It's okay! Here, I'll hold your hand! So, okay!? Let's just be brave a
little longer!?

\SE[1]Of course! Even if a ghost appears, I absolutely won't let go! Come on, let's go! We
have to prove the village chief and the others are innocent!
\SE[11]\SM[pop2]Whoa! Hey, Elly-chan! Don't go so fast! Slowly! Let's go slowly! Hey, hey!?

Alright, shall we go, Dario? We shouldn't get separated from them, it's dark and
dangerous.
skit pose マナ t child 15
skit pose エリィ t child 6
skit fadeIn エリィ f right
skit fadeIn マナ f left
...? What's wrong, you two? Why are you stopping there... huh...!

? What's with you guys? Reacting like a ghost really showed up? There's no way ghosts
are real... eeeh!!?
Kyahhh!? I-it really came out!! H-help me! Mamaaa! \n[1]!! Hyeeeh!!
B-brotheeer! A ghooost! Over there! Something's standing over thereee!! Waaahh!!
W-whoa, hey hey hey!? S-seriously, there's something there!! Eeek! H-help...!

... S-sorry... We, we were just being curious... W-we'll leave now, so please forgive
us...!
Gyaaah! I-it talked!! E-evil spirit begone! Evil spirit begone!!
\SE[15]S-sorryyy!! W-we'll leave, so please forgive us!!

\SE[13]Waaahh!! V-village chief! I'm sorryyy!! If I'd known this would happen, I never
would've come!!

......O queen. If you proceed further, the villagers will not forgive you... We do
not wish for such an end...

...Young hero. Do not set foot here again. Protect our queen until the promised time
comes...
H-he disappeared... What in the world was that...?

...After that, I calmed down the three of them who were sobbing and we headed home.
Fortunately, the adults didn't seem to notice our test of courage, so we weren't
scolded about this incident.

However, Dario and Elly seemed to be quite shaken. That night, both of them wet the
bed for the first time in a long while... For a few days after that, I had to sleep
with Elly.........

Even now, thinking back, it's an event I don't really understand... I now know the
true identity of the ghost we encountered that time. That was a monster... The one
Mana and I defeated in the northern cave a year ago.........

Why was that bastard in that place? Why did it speak human words and try to guide
us...? Even now, I don't understand its true intentions...
